products.notes: Retail hanger-pack format (Target/Walmart). Single Collector Booster per pack.
D&D crossover set. Bundle: 10 draft boosters + oversized Spindown d20 + 40 basic lands + foil promo.
First-ever Set Booster product (ZNR debuted the line). 30 packs/box, 12 cards/pack.
10 booster packs, 65 sleeves, dice, coin, Arceus V promo

Iconic lid art: Hisuian Growlithe, Sneasel, Voltorb (Legends Arceus crossover). Packaging shows 2+2+1 pack layout. Pink vertical stripe = Fusion Strike (SWSH8). Round blue border = likely Astral Radiance (SWSH10) or Lost Origin (SWSH11). Fifth pack unknown.

products.product_type: Supply Set English Edition (5 packs + sleeves + deck case)
products.notes: English edition. Contains 5 booster packs + sleeves + deck case (no playmat). Single pack comp ~$14.74 (low volume) = $73.70 in packs alone, plus supplies → $90-120 realistic floor. ILLIQUID — thin secondary market. $500 eBay listing is anchor, not true comp. Hammergirl preorder = near-release comp.
English edition. 16 packs/box, 9 cards/pack. 1st Edition print run. Wholesale (Potomac) ~$62.

products.set: Bang Dream! Premium Booster — Girls Band Party!
products.notes: English edition. 7 packs/box, 7 cards/pack, all-foil high-rarity.

products.set: Tamashii Buddies — Pretty Guardian Sailor Moon
products.notes: Bandai Tamashii Nations. ¥1,500 ex-tax / ¥1,650 inc-tax (~$12-14 USD at 2015 FX). 90mm figure with pedestal + background frame set. Budget-tier Bandai line displaced by Figuarts Mini. Weak secondary — not limited, not chase. Line ran 2013-2017.
